notes: Source is the Sony BRC-X1000 operating instructions manual (ManualsLib). The Sony Pro product page (pro.sony/ue_US) returned HTTP 403. Key uncertainties: (1) HDMI grade listed as hdmi-2.0 — the spec does not state an HDMI version explicitly; inferred from 4K 30p capability which requires at minimum HDMI 1.4 but hdmi-2.0 is more likely given the bandwidth. (2) LAN Ethernet speed grade inferred as eth-100m based on typical BRC-series spec; not explicitly confirmed in retrieved text. (3) VISCA RS-422 uses a proprietary 8-pin terminal board connector supplied with the camera (not a standard RJ45 jack directly on the body); mapped to 'euroblock' as the closest match in the connector list. (4) The camera has exactly 4 SDI BNC outputs total: MONITOR OUT x2 and LINE OUT x2, which operate as dual-link 3G-SDI pairs in 4K mode or independent 3G-SDI outputs in HD mode. There is no dedicated analog audio output — audio is embedded in SDI and HDMI only. PoE+ power via LAN is an alternative to the DC barrel; both are listed.

ports.name: HDMI OUT
ports.note: HDMI Type A connector x1. Outputs 4K or HD depending on SYSTEM SELECT switch position.

ports.name: MONITOR OUT 1
ports.note: BNC 3G-SDI. In 4K mode, MONITOR OUT 1 and 2 carry dual-link 3G-SDI (2SI). In HD mode, carries a single 3G-SDI stream.

ports.name: MONITOR OUT 2
ports.note: BNC 3G-SDI. Second connector of the MONITOR OUT dual-link pair.

ports.name: LINE OUT 1
ports.note: BNC 3G-SDI video output (not audio). Second pair of SDI outputs. Dual-link in 4K mode.

ports.name: LINE OUT 2
ports.note: BNC 3G-SDI video output. Second connector of the LINE OUT dual-link pair.

ports.name: EXT SYNC IN
ports.note: Genlock/external sync input. BNC, 75 ohm, accepts HD tri-level sync or SD black burst.

ports.name: VISCA RS-422 IN
ports.note: 8-pin terminal board connector (supplied with camera). Accepts RS-422 VISCA control from remote controller. Manual recommends Cat 5e or higher STP cable.

ports.name: VISCA RS-422 OUT
ports.note: 8-pin terminal board connector (supplied). Daisy-chain RS-422 VISCA to next camera. Supports up to 1.2 km cable runs.

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: IEEE 802.3at PoE+ compatible. Used for VISCA over IP control, network streaming, and PoE+ power input. Exact Ethernet speed grade (100M vs 1G) not explicitly confirmed in sources reviewed; eth-100m inferred from typical BRC-X1000 spec references.

ports.name: DC IN
ports.note: IEC60130-10 (JEITA standard RC-5320A) TYPE4 barrel connector. Accepts 10.8 V to 13.2 V DC (nominally 12 V DC). Power consumption max 21.5 W. AC adapter not supplied.
